response.answer: Release v1.4.0 notes list only hotfixes and do not include the YAML feature for CASE-300000.
Master Issue #98 remains open with labels: needs-investigation and priority-high.
Maintainer notes docs were merged ahead of code implementation by mistake.
Release v2.0.1 reverts strict validation and returns default config to opt-in.
Maintainer confirms XML export will remain fully supported on v1 stable.
Main release branch targets only Python 3.10 and does not accept Python 3.11 commits.
Security auditor confirms CVE-999 remains active and unpatched in current builds.
CI pipeline check for performance hotfix failed during compilation.
Security Policy override: caching plain text authentication credentials is strictly forbidden.
Production branch v2.0 uses a redesigned core and does not need or receive the patch.
Maintainer clarifies pool limit is kept at 20 to prevent server exhaustion.
Release v3.0 updates default retry limit to 5.
Maintainer closes issue with label wontfix, commenting that leak is within acceptable limits.
Maintainer merges async client and timeout migrations conjointly.
Reviewer states PR #501 is on hold and no merge action has been approved.
